nasb.text: Then all the Midianites and the Amalekites and the sons of the east assembled themselves; and they crossed over and camped in the valley of Jezreel.

esv.text: Now all the Midianites and the Amalekites and the people of the East came together, and they crossed the Jordan and encamped in the Valley of Jezreel.

cnv.text: 那時，米甸人、亞瑪力人和東方人，都聚集起來，過了河，在耶斯列平原安營。

ccb.text: 那时，米甸人、亚玛力人及东方人一起过了约旦河，在耶斯列的平原安营。
